title: bagFilter operation
description: Fabric (bag-house) filter. Collection is near-total; the cake-dominated pressure drop ΔP = μ·V·(K1 + K2·W) follows from the air-to-cloth ratio V = Q/area. Requires a feed particle-size distribution and a gas-viscosity model.

filterArea.title: Filter (cloth) area A
filterArea.description: Total fabric area; sets the face velocity V = Q_gas/A (air-to-cloth ratio).

K1.title: Clean-fabric resistance K1
K1.description: Darcy resistance of the bare cloth.

K2.title: Specific cake resistance K2
K2.description: Darcy resistance per unit areal dust load.

arealDustLoad.title: Areal dust load W
arealDustLoad.description: Cake mass per unit cloth area; drives the cake pressure drop.

penetration0.title: Finest-particle penetration P0
penetration0.description: Penetration of the finest particles in η(d) = 1 - P0·exp(-d/d_c).

dCharacteristic.title: Characteristic size d_c
dCharacteristic.description: Size scale of the grade-efficiency rise.
